---
title: Costs and Getting Access
---

## How to get access?

Each lab has designated key-users with admin rights in SciSure. VU SciSure key users can invite new users to the project group. Users can login via SSO using their VU credentials: [eLabNext](https://vu.elabnext.com).

## Are there costs involved? 

Costs are based on active licence seats and are on a yearly basis for the faculties ACTA, FGB and BETA. 

The way costs are charged is determined at the faculty level. For more information about costs, please contact your VU SciSure organisational admin.
